name: clips-library
description: Per-profile short-video library with posters, comments, view/like counters and transcode-status tracking. Supports orphan .web.mp4 files and waits-for-transcode marker files.

envVars.name: CLIPS_ROOT
envVars.description: Host directory containing per-profile subfolders with .mp4/.web.mp4 files

postInstall: 1. Run DB migration to create clip_stats, clip_likes and clip_comments tables
2. Mount a host volume at CLIPS_ROOT
4. Optional: install the transcoder-pipeline module to auto-convert originals to .web.mp4
